title: myTax 2017 Part-year tax-free threshold
description: How to complete your return using myTax if you were not an Australian resident for the whole year.
keywords: myTax, e-tax, online tax return, part-year threshold, tax-free threshold, tax-free, etax, part-year resident, foreign resident

content_blocks.text: If you were not an Australian resident for tax purposes for the whole 2016–17 year, we use the information you provide in your tax return to work out your tax-free threshold.
If you want to work it out, see:

items: Tax-free threshold for newcomers to Australia or
Tax-free threshold if you are leaving Australia permanently .
If you were not an Australian resident for tax purposes for the whole year, enter the dates when you were a resident on the Personalise return screen.
On the Adjustments screen answer the question 'Did you receive any taxable government benefits other than Australian Government special payments?'.
Select Save and continue when you have completed the Adjustments section.

content_text:
If you were not an Australian resident for tax purposes for the whole 2016–17 year, we use the information you provide in your tax return to work out your tax-free threshold.
If you want to work it out, see:
- Tax-free threshold for newcomers to Australia or
- Tax-free threshold if you are leaving Australia permanently .
## Completing this section
- If you were not an Australian resident for tax purposes for the whole year, enter the dates when you were a resident on the Personalise return screen.
- On the Adjustments screen answer the question 'Did you receive any taxable government benefits other than Australian Government special payments?'.
- Select Save and continue when you have completed the Adjustments section.
